settings.title: Settings
settings.members_description: Manage your organization's team members and their roles.
settings.remove_confirm_description: The member will lose access to the organization. This action cannot be undone.
settings.org_danger_zone_description: Deleting the organization is permanent and will remove all data. A full purge happens via a runbook after soft delete.
settings.org_delete_dialog_description: This will soft-delete "{name}". All data will be retained until the purge runbook is executed. This action cannot be undone.
settings.org_delete_confirm_label: Type the organization name to confirm
settings.billing_portal_description: Access the billing portal to download invoices and manage payment methods.

notifications_settings.title: Notifications
notifications_settings.description: Choose which emails you receive from this organisation. Settings are per user and per organisation.
notifications_settings.daily_report_description: Evening email digest with the day's KPIs and booked appointments.
notifications_settings.appointment_booked_description: Immediate notification whenever a call books a new appointment.
notifications_settings.qualified_lead_description: Notification when a contact is qualified as interested.
notifications_settings.low_credit_description: Warning when the remaining credit drops below the safety threshold.
notifications_settings.campaign_completed_description: Notification when a campaign finishes, with a summary of results.
notifications_settings.weekly_summary_description: Monday-morning email with the previous week's performance.

compliance.gdpr_notice: Data is processed in accordance with GDPR.

compliance_settings.title: Compliance & GDPR
compliance_settings.description: Handle data subject requests and access policy documents.
compliance_settings.rights_description: Export every record we hold for a contact (Article 15) or request erasure (Article 17). Exports produce a ZIP archive valid for 7 days.
compliance_settings.identifier_hint: Use E.164 phone format or the email tied to the contact.
compliance_settings.export_success: Export ready — link valid for 7 days
compliance_settings.subject_not_found: No contact matches the identifier provided
compliance_settings.history_description: Exports and erasures performed for your organization.
compliance_settings.history_empty_description: GDPR requests you submit will appear here.
compliance_settings.erase_dialog_description: This permanently scrubs the contact's data: recordings, transcripts, call metadata and PII are removed. The phone number is preserved in the opt-out registry to prevent further contact.
compliance_settings.erase_confirm_phone_label: Type the contact phone number to confirm
compliance_settings.erase_confirm_phone_hint: Must match the E.164 number stored on the contact exactly.
compliance_settings.erase_reason_placeholder: e.g. Written request from the data subject dated 2026-05-08
compliance_settings.erase_mismatch: The number you entered does not match. Try again.
compliance_settings.docs_description: Platform legal documents. Opens in a new tab.
compliance_settings.dpa_banner_description_outdated: The Data Processing Agreement has been updated from version {acceptedVersion} to version {currentVersion}. Confirm the new version to continue using the platform.
compliance_settings.dpa_banner_description_never: Your organization has not yet accepted the Data Processing Agreement (version {currentVersion}). Confirm to continue using the platform.

audit_log.title: Audit log
audit_log.description: Tracking of all significant actions performed in your organization.
audit_log.export_success_truncated: Exported the {count} most recent rows (limit reached)
audit_log.empty_description: No actions matching the filters have been recorded yet.

landing.hero_title: Voice AI Outbound for Car Dealerships
landing.hero_subtitle: Automate reactivation calls, confirm appointments, and manage post-sale follow-ups with AI voice agents. Scale your sales team without increasing costs.
landing.vp1_description: Automatically reach inactive leads with personalised calls. Your AI agents contact hundreds of potential customers per day, qualify interest, and book appointments for your team.
landing.vp2_description: Eliminate no-shows with automatic phone reminders. The system confirms, reschedules, or cancels appointments autonomously, syncing your calendar in real time.
landing.vp3_description: Stay in touch with customers after purchase. Collect satisfaction feedback, propose additional services, and build lasting relationships that drive repeat business.
landing.pricing_description: Pay only for the minutes you use. No annual contracts, no hidden costs.

scripts.test_call_phone_invalid: Enter a valid Italian E.164 phone number (e.g. +393331234567)
scripts.test_call_rate_limit: Daily limit of 10 test calls reached. Try again tomorrow.

legal.draft_notice: Draft document — content is illustrative and must be validated by legal counsel before publication.
legal.controller_value: VoiceFlow S.r.l. — Via Esempio 1, 00100 Rome — privacy@voiceflow.example
legal.privacy_subtitle: How we process personal data of VoiceFlow platform users.
legal.privacy_section_controller_body: The data controller is VoiceFlow S.r.l., based in Italy. For any data protection inquiry please write to privacy@voiceflow.example.
legal.privacy_section_data_collected_body: We process identification data (name, surname, email), contact data, billing data, platform usage data and, for dealership customers, phone numbers and call recordings.
legal.privacy_section_purposes_body: Data is processed for service delivery, contractual obligations, billing, platform security, regulatory compliance (including RPO and GDPR) and, with consent, marketing.
legal.privacy_section_legal_basis_body: Processing is based on contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR), legal obligations (Art. 6.1.c GDPR), legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f GDPR) and, where required, explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR).
legal.privacy_section_retention_body: Call recordings are retained for 12 months (configurable per organization), transcripts for 24 months, audit logs for 7 years, billing data for 10 years. Soft-deleted contacts are hard-deleted after 30 days.
legal.privacy_section_rights_body: Data subjects may exercise the rights under Articles 15–22 GDPR (access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection) by writing to privacy@voiceflow.example. The platform offers self-service tools for export and erasure under the Compliance section.
legal.privacy_section_processors_body: We engage external processors (cloud providers, telephony, AI models, payments) under agreements compliant with Art. 28 GDPR. The full list is available on request.
legal.privacy_section_transfers_body: Any transfers to third countries are based on Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission or adequacy decisions.
legal.privacy_section_contact_body: To exercise rights or for any question please write to privacy@voiceflow.example. Complaints may also be filed with the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante).
legal.dpa_subtitle: Agreement under Art. 28 GDPR between the controller (dealership) and the processor (VoiceFlow).
legal.dpa_section_parties_body: This agreement is between the Customer, as data controller for its contacts' data, and VoiceFlow S.r.l., as data processor. For platform user data (organization members), VoiceFlow acts as an independent controller.
legal.dpa_section_subject_body: The subject is the processing of personal data necessary for the provision of the VoiceFlow service. Duration matches the service contract.
legal.dpa_section_data_categories_body: Data categories: identification, contact, interaction (recordings, transcripts). Data subject categories: Customer's clients and prospects.
legal.dpa_section_obligations_body: VoiceFlow processes data only on documented Customer instructions, ensures confidentiality, applies adequate security measures, and assists the Customer in handling data subject requests and impact assessments.
legal.dpa_section_subprocessors_body: The Customer authorizes VoiceFlow to engage sub-processors. The current list is published, and the Customer is notified of changes with 30 days notice.
legal.dpa_section_security_body: VoiceFlow applies adequate technical and organizational measures including in-transit and at-rest encryption, RBAC access control, audit logs, multi-tenant isolation via RLS, and encrypted backups.
legal.dpa_section_breach_body: VoiceFlow notifies the Customer of any personal data breach without undue delay and in any event within 72 hours of becoming aware of it.
legal.dpa_section_termination_body: Upon termination, VoiceFlow returns or deletes personal data per the Customer's instructions, except where retention is required by law.
legal.terms_subtitle: General terms governing the use of the VoiceFlow platform.
legal.terms_section_acceptance_body: Use of the platform implies full acceptance of these terms. If you disagree, you must stop using the service.
legal.terms_section_service_body: VoiceFlow is a SaaS platform that automates AI voice calls for lead reactivation, appointment confirmations and post-sale follow-up.
legal.terms_section_account_body: Users are responsible for safeguarding their credentials and for all activity carried out through their account. Sharing credentials with third parties is forbidden.
legal.terms_section_acceptable_use_body: It is forbidden to use the platform for illegal purposes, to contact numbers listed in the Italian Public Opposition Registry in violation of regulations, or for telephone spam.
legal.terms_section_billing_body: The service is prepaid via credits. Purchased credits are valid for 24 months and are non-refundable except where required by law.
legal.terms_section_liability_body: To the extent permitted by law, VoiceFlow's liability is limited to the fees paid by the Customer in the 12 months preceding the event.
legal.terms_section_termination_body: The Customer may terminate at any time. VoiceFlow may suspend or terminate the account in case of breach of these terms.
legal.terms_section_law_body: These terms are governed by Italian law. Exclusive venue is the courts of Rome.
legal.cookie_subtitle: Information about cookies used by the VoiceFlow website and platform.
legal.cookie_section_what_body: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device that allow the browser to be recognized and enable site functionality.
legal.cookie_section_types_body: We use essential technical cookies (session, authentication, locale and theme preferences) and aggregated analytics cookies. We do not use third-party profiling cookies.
legal.cookie_section_consent_body: Technical cookies do not require consent. Aggregated analytics cookies rely on legitimate interest, with the option to opt out via browser settings.
legal.cookie_section_management_body: Users can configure their browser to refuse or delete cookies. Disabling some cookies may limit platform functionality.

calls.call_not_refundable: This call has no charged cost
